name: Grilled Fajitas (4 Hrs to Overnight)
recipeIngredient: Green, sweet red and/or yellow peppers -- julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flank steak in a glass dish.
2. Combine the onion soup mix, vegetable oil, lime juice, water, garlic, lime peel, cumin, oregano, and pepper; pour over meat.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
4. Drain and discard the marinade.
5. Grill the meat over hot coals until it reaches desired doneness: about 4 minutes per side for medium, or 5 minutes per side for medium-well.
6. Meanwhile, in a skillet, saute onion and peppers in oil for 3-4 minutes or until crisp-tender.
7. Slice the meat into thin strips across the grain.
8. Place slices on tortillas.
9. Top with vegetables; roll up and serve immediately.
